sentences.arabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ بَدْءُ مَشْرُوعٍ تِجَارِيٍّ جَدِيدٍ مَزِيجاً مِنَ الشَّجَاعَةِ، وَالِابْتِكَارِ، وَالتَّخْطِيطِ الدَّقِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Pokretanje novog poslovnog projekta zahtijeva spoj hrabrosti, inovacije i pažljivog planiranja.
sentences.translationEn: Starting a new business project requires a combination of courage, innovation, and careful planning.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى رَائِدِ الْأَعْمَالِ تَحْدِيدُ فَجْوَةٍ فِي السُّوقِ وَتَقْدِيمُ حَلٍّ فَرِيدٍ يُلَبِّي احْتِيَاجَاتِ الْمُسْتَهْلِكِينَ.
sentences.translation: Preduzetnik mora identifikovati prazninu na tržištu i ponuditi jedinstveno rješenje koje zadovoljava potrebe potrošača.
sentences.translationEn: An entrepreneur must identify a gap in the market and offer a unique solution that meets consumer needs.

sentences.arabic: رَغْمَ أَنَّ الرِّحْلَةَ مَلِيئَةٌ بِالْمَخَاطِرِ، إِلَّا أَنَّ فُرَصَ النُّمُوِّ الشَّخْصِيِّ وَالْمَالِيِّ تَكُونُ هَائِلَةً.
sentences.translation: Iako je putovanje ispunjeno rizicima, prilike za lični i finansijski rast su ogromne.
sentences.translationEn: Although the journey is full of risks, the opportunities for personal and financial growth are immense.

sentences.arabic: يُوَفِّرُ التَّوَاصُلُ مَعَ الْمُوَجِّهِينَ ذَوِي الْخِبْرَةِ رُؤًى قَيِّمَةً تُسَاعِدُ فِي تَجَاوُزِ الْعَقَبَاتِ الْأَوَّلِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Povezivanje s iskusnim mentorima pruža dragocjene uvide koji pomažu u prevazilaženju početnih prepreka.
sentences.translationEn: Networking with experienced mentors provides valuable insights that help in overcoming initial obstacles.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْإِصْرَارَ فِي مُوَاجَهَةِ الْفَشَلِ هُوَ مَا يُمَيِّزُ رُوَّادَ الْأَعْمَالِ النَّاجِحِينَ عَنْ غَيْرِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Upornost u suočavanju s neuspjehom je ono što razlikuje uspješne preduzetnike od ostalih.
sentences.translationEn: Persistence in the face of failure is what distinguishes successful entrepreneurs from others.
